name: transaction-crud-template
description: Pattern for transactional records that share a common shape: line items as JSON, total amount, payment method, status enum. Adapt per concrete entity (invoice, sales receipt, pickup order, ...).

placeholders.entities: plural lowercase / snake_case (e.g. invoices, sales_receipts, pickup_orders)
placeholders.defaultStatus: default status as a quoted string (e.g. "unpaid")

endpoints: GET /api/{{entities}} — list (admin sees all, user sees own)

postInstall: 1. Decide your concrete entity (Invoice / SalesReceipt / PickupOrder / Order / ...)
2. Pick a status enum and default for it
4. Files marked `shared: true` (line-items.ts, LineItemsForm.tsx) only need to be copied once — they're entity-agnostic
5. If you want autocomplete from a local article catalog, install article-catalog-with-pricing and wire onLookup to GET /api/articles/lookup
